reviews.comment:
Es una pequeña gasolinera sobre la ruta nacional 8 en Canals provincia de Córdoba.
Es un sitio pequeño la atencion del minimercado no me gustó
Los sutidores bien
Los sanitarios estaban poco limpios.
Por ser una estacion perteneciente a una red y por la que se abona membresía deberia ser mejor atendida.

(Translated by Google)
It's a small gas station on National Route 8 in Canals, Córdoba province.
It's a small place, and I didn't like the service at the convenience store. The pumps were fine. The restrooms weren't very clean. Since it's a station belonging to a network and requires a membership fee, it should receive better service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROS1hZDhRRRAB
